mapper.sql: id, article_title, article_content, article_excerpt, cover_image, sort_order, view_count, category_id, author_id, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article ( article_title, article_content, article_excerpt, cover_image, sort_order, view_count, category_id, author_id, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{articleTitle}, #{articleContent}, #{articleExcerpt}, #{coverImage}, #{sortOrder}, #{viewCount}, #{categoryId}, #{authorId}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, 0 )

INSERT INTO article ( article_title, article_content, article_excerpt, cover_image, sort_order, view_count, category_id, author_id, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted ) VALUES
( #{item.articleTitle}, #{item.articleContent}, #{item.articleExcerpt}, #{item.coverImage}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.viewCount}, #{item.categoryId}, #{item.authorId}, #{item.status}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime}, 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE article
article_title = #{articleTitle}, article_content = #{articleContent}, article_excerpt = #{articleExcerpt}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, view_count = #{viewCount}, category_id = #{categoryId}, author_id = #{authorId}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime},
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE article SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM article WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT FROM article WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND id IN
#{id}

SELECT id, article_title, article_excerpt, cover_image, sort_order, view_count, category_id, author_id, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted FROM article
is_deleted = 0
AND category_id = #{request.categoryId}
AND status = #{request.status}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM article_tag WHERE article_tag.article_id = article.id AND article_tag.tag_id = #{request.tagId} )
ORDER BY create_time
DESC
ASC
ORDER BY view_count
DESC
ASC
ORDER BY create_time DESC
ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE article SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
